title: Import & Export Assistant Manager (West/ up to $5,800)
description:
Job ID: 1398500
Responsibilities:

  • Lead and develop the Import/Export team, overseeing end-to-end trade operations including permits, billing, quotations, cost control, and customer payment collection.
  • Manage operational and financial risks through proactive recovery planning, reporting, and close coordination with overseas branches, agents, partners, carriers, and NVOCCs, including rate negotiations.
  • Ensure full compliance with regulatory and quality standards (Zero GST, MES, RACA, ISO 9001/14001/45001, bizSAFE STAR), liaising with Customs, IRAS, and relevant authorities.
  • Drive process and system enhancements by streamlining manual workflows, managing system change requests, and supporting system integration with the parent company.
  • Prepare and present regular performance, improvement, and strategic reports to Management, HQ, and key stakeholders.
  • Support sales and business development initiatives, contributing to new customer acquisition and achieving an annual GTB target of SGD 100,000 for the Import/Export division.


Requirements:

  • Diploma in Logistics/ Supply Chain or equivalent
  • Over 10 years of experience in the freight forwarding industry, with hands-on import and export operations exposure
  • Strong knowledge of Singapore air and sea freight regulations, customs procedures, and compliance requirements
  • Well-versed in shipping documentation, including Bills of Lading, Commercial Invoices, and Packing Lists
  • Proven experience using AS400 and CargoWise systems, including support during system transition and integration
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications (Excel, Word, PowerPoint) and related business software
  • Highly organized with strong attention to detail, able to prioritize and multitask effectively in a fast-paced environment
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills


To Apply, please kindly email your updated resume to elaine@goodjobcreations.com.sg

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. However, rest assured that all applications will be updated to our resume bank for future opportunities

Please kindly refer to the Privacy Policy of Good Job Creations for your reference:

https://goodjobcreations.com.sg/en/privacy-policy/
